calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Show Cause Why Defendant Should Not Be Held In Contempt, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Dec-20-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Molalla Holdings, Inc.'s Motion For Order To Show Cause Why Anthony Cowan Should Not Be Held In Contempt is granted. Plaintiff shall make personal service of the Order To Show Cause no later than January 23, 2007 for a hearing date of February 23, 2007 at 10:30 a.m. in Room 612. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Ntc Of Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-30-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Molalla Holdings, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Judgment Debtor's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Judgment Debtor is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
